findings.message: AC-02 accepts `README.md` at ≤90 lines, but CN-01 in the same spec says Tier 1 files, explicitly including `README.md`, must be ≤80 lines. That means an 81-90 line README would satisfy the acceptance criterion while violating the plan's stated Tier 1 constraint.

AC-04 makes `LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md` pass at ≤120 lines even though IN-04 and the D3 target cited by the spec require shrinking it to about 90 lines. This leaves the shrink target non-binding, so a materially under-shrunk file could satisfy the plan's acceptance gate.

IN-01 enumerates five `.claude/docs/` observation lines for DESIGN.md (874 / 1019 / 1023 / 1024 / 1025), but AC-06 and T008 describe D6 #5(d) as only four observations (`4 件`, `1/4`, `2-4/4`). This is a semantic contradiction in the plan-artifact coverage for the orphan cleanup; align the count/list so the acceptance criterion and task text describe the same observation set.
